title: BLUELIGHT RAT: C2 via Microsoft Graph API
description: Detects non-standard processes connecting to Microsoft Graph API endpoints. BLUELIGHT uses Microsoft Graph API and OneDrive for command-and-control, blending with legitimate Microsoft traffic to evade network detection.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Event ID' = 3 and ('Destination Hostname' like '*graph.microsoft.com*' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*login.microsoftonline.com*')) and not (('Process Name' like '*\\OneDrive.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\Teams.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\OUTLOOK.EXE' or 'Process Name' like '*\\msedge.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\chrome.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\firefox.exe')))
falsepositives: Custom applications legitimately using Microsoft Graph API
PowerShell scripts using Graph API for administration
